name: Kaelen Duskbane
sd_appearance: Half-Elf, Silver-streaked black hair hangs in a messy ponytail, with amber eyes that flicker like dying embers. A thin scar runs from temple to jaw, and they carry themselves with gruff weariness, always checking their back for threats., wearing chain mail or scale mail, carrying warhammer, crossbow, rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
